summary: Keep time-windowed workout analysis date-safe, bound OAuth callback shutdown, and surface optional-input database read failures.
reason: Undated workouts cannot be assigned to a requested time window, callback handlers must not keep the local OAuth server alive indefinitely, and SQLite iteration errors must not be mistaken for absent optional data.
validated_outcome: Digest and backup windows exclude undated workouts; OAuth callback shutdown releases its listener even with an active handler; power-zone and user-profile query failures reach command callers.
